    ABOUT US >

    The Global Awareness Society International, Inc., is a non-profit corporation (Pennsylvania) founded in 1991. We are a 501(c)(3) organization under the U.S. Internal Revenue Service guidelines.

    ​

    The Global Awareness Society International is committed to equal educational, participation, and publication opportunities for all persons without regard to race, religion, gender, age, national origin, sexual orientation, disability, or veteran status.
